content.en:
Void Heaven True Country, Void Heaven Palace.

Ye Tian, Moon Shooting True Ancestor, Dreamless True Ancestor, and Xingyue True Ancestor all came one by one, and in addition, there were a large number of other True Ancestors, who also gathered here.

But there are still many True Ancestors who have not arrived, not because they are not in the Void Heaven True Country, but because they are guarding the surrounding formations of the Void Heaven True Country Protector Array, and opening the Great Array to prevent the Void Heaven True Kingdom from being easily penetrated.

Ye Tian glanced around and roughly estimated the strength of the True Ancestor of the Void Heaven Pulse.

He is the strongest true ancestor, and there are three top true ancestors, thousands of elite true ancestors, and hundreds of thousands of ordinary true ancestors, this is the number of true ancestors of the Void Heaven lineage.

In addition, there are about 100,000 True Ancestors who are coming from the Void Heaven Realm, but it will take a few days, and it is estimated that there will be no way to catch up with the Great War.

"Report on the number of True Ancestors in the Dark God Temple, as well as the number of True Ancestors in the Liuli Sect!"

Shooting the Moon True Ancestor Dao.

At this time, a True Ancestor who specialized in collecting intelligence stood up and said, "According to the investigation, there are about 10,000 True Ancestors in the Liuli Sect, one of which is a Supreme True Ancestor, dozens of top True Ancestors, nearly 5,000 elite True Ancestors, and the others are ordinary True Ancestors. And the Dark God Temple has about four top True Ancestors, a thousand elite True Ancestors, and two hundred thousand ordinary True Ancestors! In terms of the number of True Ancestors, we have an advantage, but at the top level, our Void Heaven Temple is too far behind!"

When the other True Ancestors heard this data, their faces turned in despair.

In such a big battle, ordinary True Ancestors are not the key to determining the outcome of the battle at all, and in the end, it is still up to the top True Ancestors.

However, several top True Ancestors before the Void Heaven First Pulse used the Merge Dao Treasure to impact the True Ancestor realm, resulting in only three top True Ancestors at present, which was not as good as the Dark God Temple.

You must know that when the Dark Temple was hunted down by the Void Heaven Pulse before, it had already killed several top True Ancestors, otherwise, there were more than four Top True Ancestors sent this time.

And the Liuli Sect is even more terrifying, dozens of top true ancestors, one supreme true ancestor, how can this be fought?

"Are there no forces willing to support us?"

Moon Shooting True Ancestor asked.

"No, even the vein forces that have a good relationship with us are not willing to support, they are afraid of the Liuli Sect, and they don't want a large number of True Ancestors to fall and die. True Ancestor reported.

"What else can you do, let's talk about it!"

The Moon Shooting True Ancestor said with a little despair.

He couldn't help it, once those dozens of top true ancestors came to kill, what was the use of relying on a few of their top true ancestors alone, once that supreme true ancestor made a move, it was estimated that the three of their top true ancestors would be killed in a short time.

Many True Ancestors shook their heads one after another, all of them, there was nothing they could do.

At this time, Ye Tian stood up and said, "I have a way!"

"What way?" Shooting Moon True Ancestor's eyes lit up with hope and looked at Ye Tian.

Ye Tian said in a deep voice: "The strongest in the Liuli Sect at present is the strongest true ancestor named Xuanling True Ancestor, fortunately, there is only one Supreme True Ancestor in the Liuli Sect, if this Supreme True Ancestor falls in advance, then our crisis can be passed safely!"

"Kill the Xuanling True Ancestor, how can this be done!"

The True Ancestors shook their heads one by one, thinking that this idea might as well be fought directly!

The Moon Shooting True Ancestor frowned and said, "Ten Thousand Law True Ancestor, you said to kill the Xuanling True Ancestor, how to kill it, who will kill it?"

"Me!" Ye Tian said: "I just happened to break through to the ranks of the strongest true ancestors, if I tried my best, there would be no hope of killing the Xuanling True Ancestor!"

"What, Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, have you stepped into the ranks of the strongest True Ancestor?"

Many True Ancestors couldn't believe it.

They all knew that it hadn't been long since Ye Tiancai broke through to the Supreme True Ancestor, and now he had become the Supreme True Ancestor so quickly, it was incredible!

"Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, if you really break through to the ranks of the strongest True Ancestor, then you shouldn't take any risks, I suggest giving up the Void Heaven True Realm first, withdrawing from the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and then killing back in the future!" the Moon Shooting True Ancestor suggested.

This statement was recognized by many True Ancestors, and they all demanded to withdraw from the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

However, Ye Tian retorted: "Once you give up the Void Heaven True Country, what is the chance of killing it again? And once the Dark God Temple masters the Void Heaven True Kingdom and several other True Kingdoms, it can definitely rise quickly, how can we resist them at that time? And without the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, even if I want to make rapid progress, I can't do it at all! Don't forget, the Liuli Sect is the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and we must make rapid progress before we can hope to compete with the real Liuli Sect." If you are afraid, then what are you resisting, just surrender!"

Many True Ancestors were speechless when they said this.

That's right!

The Xuanxu Ancient Realm has now almost become the center of the Dao Mountain Realm, there are countless opportunities here, every True Ancestor is making rapid progress, once they leave here, I am afraid that if they want to progress a little, it will take a long time.

For example, the Dark Temple's previous foundation in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm was destroyed, resulting in the Dark Temple's True Ancestors almost rarely increasing, and even rapidly decreasing in the continuous pursuit.

However, the true ancestors of the Void Heaven True Kingdom were born in large numbers, even surpassing the Dark God Temple.

You must know that in the past, the true ancestor of the Dark God Temple didn't know how much more than the Void Heaven One Vein, but now the Void Heaven One Vein has completely surpassed the Dark God Temple.

If the Void Heaven escapes this time, it will be really difficult to turn the tables again!

Therefore this intention is not advisable!

At this time, Ye Tian said again: "We must take the initiative, I will go to the Liuli Sect and openly challenge the Xuanling True Ancestor, and you can also publicize it everywhere." In this way, under the general trend, the Liuli Sect will not be embarrassed to attack me. Moreover, the Xuanling True Ancestor, as the strongest True Ancestor, probably won't take me seriously, and will definitely accept my challenge, once that time comes, I will directly block the battlefield and fight to the death with the Xuanling True Ancestor. As long as I kill the Xuanling True Ancestor, the Liuli Sect will inevitably lose the confidence to fight with our Void Heaven lineage. This is the only way to break the game!"

The Moon Shooting True Ancestor did not refute, this was indeed the only way to break the game.

However, the premise is that Ye Tian wins, if Ye Tian is defeated, then the Void Heaven True Kingdom will not have the slightest power to resist.

"In this way, once I am defeated, you can immediately give up the Void Heaven True Kingdom, how about it?" Ye Tian proposed.

With that, the other True Ancestors had no opinion.

"Yes!"

"I agree with the plan of the Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor!"

"Seconded!"

"Seconded!"

......

Many True Ancestors of the Void Heaven Hall agreed to Ye Tian's plan by almost unanimous vote.

They didn't dare to waste time, for fear that the Liuli Sect would kill them immediately, in that case, it would be too late to challenge.

As a result, many True Ancestors spread the news of Ye Tian's challenge to the Xuanling True Ancestor one by one.

And Ye Tian immediately tore through the void, left the Void Heaven True Country, and went to the relic space where the Liuli Sect was located.

In front of the gate of Liulizong Mountain.

Ye Tian led the Moon Shooting True Ancestor and many other True Ancestors, and issued a challenge letter with the power of rules.

"Xuanling True Ancestor, you sent someone to assassinate me before, and today my Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor will challenge you, regardless of life or death. If you are afraid, I will leave immediately! It also means that your Xuanling True Ancestor is afraid of me and admits this matter!"

Ye Tian said wildly.

At the same time, the True Ancestors of many forces also came to the vicinity, ready to observe this battle and see the excitement, among which there were many True Ancestors of the Upper Triple Heaven.

Inside the Liuli Sect.

Xuanling True Ancestor and the others were extremely angry, and they couldn't wait to destroy Ye Tian.

"Xuanling True Ancestor, Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor is here, we might as well kill him!" the Fire Cloud True Ancestor of the Dark God Temple proposed.

At present, the True Ancestors of the Dark God Temple and the Liuli Sect are about to be gathered, as long as the Xuanling True Ancestor gives an order, they can wipe out Ye Tian and the others.

"You can't attack at this time, otherwise the reputation of our Liuli Sect will be completely gone, and what if any force takes advantage of the problem and attacks our Liuli Sect?"

"What then?"

Fire Cloud True Ancestor asked.

"Fight!" Xuan Ling True Ancestor said: "The Void Heaven True Nation is estimated to be at the end of the road, and there is no way, so I thought of this method that is not a way, maybe this Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor wants to kill me, maybe it is to delay time and let the Void Heaven True Kingdom retreat." But no matter which plan it is, it is in vain. I'm not an ordinary Supreme True Ancestor, and I'm not weak in the ranks of Supreme True Ancestors, just one Ten Thousand Laws True Ancestor, I can easily kill him!"

Immediately, Xuanling True Ancestor responded to Ye Tian's challenge-

"Fight!"
